name: @rhombus-std/mergesynth.ttsc.e2e
description: End-to-end harness for the #213 merge-strategy synthesis stage: drives the real ttsc over a fixture wiring the in-repo-only ttsc-std-full host, then asserts the emitted JS (inlined typia guards, threaded merge map, no typia trace) and the runtime dispatch (argument-shape routing, hand-authored-wins, no collision throw). Not published.
